import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  mut token_start = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if is_ws
        if in_token
          let tok = string.substring(s, token_start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          in_token = false
        end
      else
        if not in_token
          token_start = i
          in_token = true
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_token
    let tok = string.substring(s, token_start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      min_val = v
    when None
      ()
    end
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut i = 1
    while i < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
          min_idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, min_idx)
  end
  sorted
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_list(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
